content: Just as 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory systems prioritize selective retention of high-information unexpected experiences to reduce storage bloat and improve learning efficiency, general-purpose AI agents can re-frame their core goal as curating memory rather than expanding it, using curiosity-driven active sampling to prune low-value experiences over time. This shifts the default agent design paradigm from 'store all you see' to 'actively seek only what you will need to remember'.
